nasb.text: Then they gave Hebron to Caleb, as Moses had promised; and he drove out from there the three sons of Anak.

esv.text: And Hebron was given to Caleb, as Moses had said. And he drove out from it the three sons of Anak.

cnv.text: 猶大照著摩西的吩咐，把希伯崙給了迦勒；迦勒就從那裡趕走亞衲子孫的三族。

ccb.text: 照摩西的吩咐，迦勒得到了希伯仑。他把亚衲三族的人从那里赶走。
